releaseNotes: Fixes the audio events disappearing after a reinstall. Snore/cough events upload to the server at sleep-session save time, but pre-v2.13.14 the app never pulled them back down — so a fresh install or a new device lost the Tonight's Sounds card and the snore/cough sections inside past-record expansions until the user generated new ones. Sleep sync now pulls audio events for the past 7 days' records; expanding an older record also lazy-fetches from the server when local is empty.
